# R1

Parent: [Scripts](../README.md)

Operational scripts and automation helpers for the R1 workflow.

## Key Files

- `equip.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `foil-collect.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `foothold.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `golden-star.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `mass-equip.sh`: Script or runtime helper.
- `paris.json`: Source file in this module.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
